description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a dark, slightly weathered finish and a broad, flat work surface. The desk features a solid panel on one side and a set of three drawers with metal handles on the opposite side, providing ample storage space. The legs are sturdy and straight, with a horizontal support bar connecting them for added stability. The top surface has a slightly lighter border framing a darker central panel, giving it a classic, professional appearance. The drawers are vertically aligned and appear to be of equal size, suitable for storing office supplies or documents. The overall design is functional and robust, making it suitable for work or study environments.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden desk with a dark finish, three side drawers, and a broad work surface. It features a solid panel on one side and a classic, professional look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid panel on the left and open leg space on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the solid panel beneath the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three drawers with metal handles and the open leg space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid panel and the desk's rectangular shape.
attribute_orientation: The side with the three drawers and open leg space is intended to face the user, while the solid panel forms the back of the desk.
